name: Jack Segal
abstract: Jack Segal (October 19, 1918 – February 10, 2005) was an American pianist and composer of popular American songs, known for writing the lyrics to Scarlet Ribbons. His composition May I Come In?

works_created.t: Nothing Ever Changes for You My Love

about_quotes.speaker: George Handy
about_quotes.evidence: I ran into Jack Segal and explained it to him and we sat down and started writing together. It was very easy to write together, and he and I were knocking things off one after another easily.

about_quotes.speaker: Bill Crow
about_quotes.evidence: Jack was busy in the Brill Building world... he was always good for a dinner and a loan of $5 if I would go over there scuffling. And he was a nice guy, and we always had parties at his house.
about_quotes.doc_title: Bill Crow interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, October 18, 1995
